reviews.comment:
Hace un mes que no tienen personal para atender el.YPF FULL ,vte haces 150 km y solo te pueden vender un café. El Full no existe

(Translated by Google)
They haven't had staff to attend to the YPF FULL for a month, if you drive 150 km and they can only sell you a coffee. The Full does not exist

reviews.comment:
Una pena que ya no acepten mascotas, siempre que viajo paraba ahí, pero lamentablemente cambiaron las políticas de Pet Friendly

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame they no longer accept pets; I always used to stop there when I traveled, but unfortunately they changed their pet-friendly policies.
